component:
<SignInPage if="<- auth@isAuthorized | not">
<ApiEndpoint ref="api" (...)="@@api" token="<- auth@token" onUnauthorized="-> auth.invalidateToken()" /> <UserProfileService ref="user" persistence="@@auth.persistence" invokeApi="<- api@invoke" /> <AsyncLoader isLoading="<- user@isLoading" title="@@strings.app_load_user_profile" subtitle="@@strings.app_load_user_profile_subtitle">
<UserProfileModal if="<- user@showProfile" />
